# Catalyx Labs E-Commerce Website

This is a Next.js e-commerce platform for Catalyx Labs with product catalog, shopping cart, authentication, blog, and team showcase.

## Setup Checklist

- [ ] Scaffold Next.js project structure
- [ ] Install dependencies  
- [ ] Configure environment variables
- [ ] Set up authentication system
- [ ] Create product catalog pages
- [ ] Implement shopping cart functionality
- [ ] Add blog/content management
- [ ] Set up team/portfolio showcase
- [ ] Verify project builds and runs

## Project Structure

- `/app` - Next.js App Router pages and layouts
- `/components` - Reusable React components
- `/lib` - Utility functions and helpers
- `/public` - Static assets
- `/styles` - Global and component styles
- `/types` - TypeScript type definitions
- `/api` - Backend API routes

## Development Guidelines

- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Follow React best practices
- Keep components modular and reusable
- Use Next.js Image optimization for product images
- Implement proper error handling and validation

## Catalyx Grow OS build spec

For the full Codex build prompt (including Subscription / Catalyx Pro Mode, Stripe, feature flags, and premium grow-assistant requirements), see `docs/codex-prompt.md`.
